description: A product has been discontinued for years, and the remaining obsolete inventory needs to be disposed of.

nodes.task_description: Run a report to identify all inventory with no sales activity in the last two years.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of obsolete stock.

nodes.task_description: Create a disposal order for the obsolete items.

expected_outcome.value: A formal order to dispose of the goods is created.

nodes.task_description: Adjust the inventory records to write off the disposed stock.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adjusts the inventory quantity to zero, recording it as a write-off.
